_comment: Fold multiple NERC registrations that share one HQ into a single map dot. Source rows stay in geocoded-orgs.json; build-orgs.mjs merges roles onto the canonical id and drops the satellites from public/nerc/orgs.json.
_review_progress: PAUSE: Batch 5 reviewed (geocoded-orgs indices 400–499). Resume at index 500 (NCR07195). Run: node scripts/nerc/review-map-combine-batch.mjs 6

combines.label: AEP Columbus HQ
combines.summary: Six separate NERC registrations share AEP's Columbus headquarters and appear here as one map location.

combines.label: Flat Ridge 2 wind
combines.summary: Clearlight Energy (America) and Flat Ridge 2 Wind Energy share the same plant address and EIA interconnection record; one map location.

combines.label: Coyote Ridge wind
combines.summary: Coyote Ridge Wind (GO) and Invenergy Services-Coyote Ridge (GOP) share the Brookings County plant site.

combines.label: Ironwood wind
combines.summary: Ironwood Windpower (GO) and DS Cornerstone (GOP) share the Spearville plant site; DS Cornerstone is the Duke/Sumitomo JV operator.

combines.label: Glacier's Edge wind
combines.summary: Glacier's Edge Wind Project (GO) and EDF Renewable Service (GOP) share the Cleghorn, IA plant site.

combines.label: Harrison County Power Project
combines.summary: Northeast Texas Electric Cooperative - HCPP (GO) and NRG Energy Services LLC - HCPP (GOP) share the Marshall, TX plant site.

combines.label: Prairie Breeze II/III
combines.summary: Prairie Breeze Wind Energy II and III share the same Elgin, NE plant office address.

combines.label: Golden Spread Panhandle Wind
combines.summary: Golden Spread Panhandle Wind Ranch (GO) and NRG Energy Services-Panhandle Wind Ranch (GOP) share the Wildorado, TX plant site.

combines.label: Dogwood Energy
combines.summary: Dogwood Power Management (GO) and NAES Corporation - Dogwood (GOP) share the Pleasant Hill, MO plant site.

combines.label: Southern Power HQ
combines.summary: Southern Power Company MRO and NPCC registrations share the Atlanta headquarters.

combines.label: MEAN HQ
combines.summary: Municipal Energy Agency of Nebraska MRO and WECC registrations share the Lincoln, NE headquarters.

combines.label: NorthWestern HQ
combines.summary: NorthWestern Corporation (WECC) and NorthWestern Energy Public Service (MRO) share the Sioux Falls headquarters.

combines.label: Brooklyn Navy Yard Cogen
combines.summary: Brooklyn Navy Yard Cogeneration Partners (GO) and BNY Power Operations (GOP) share the Brooklyn plant site.

combines.label: Constellation Kennett Square HQ
combines.summary: Constellation Energy Generation Nuclear and Power NPCC registrations share the Kennett Square, PA headquarters.

combines.label: Downeast Wind
combines.summary: Downeast Wind (GO) and AWAM - Downeast Wind (GOP) share the Columbia, ME plant site.

combines.label: Tatanka wind
combines.summary: Tatanka Wind Power (GO) and Invenergy Services-Tatanka (GOP) share the Ashley, ND plant site.

combines.label: Empire Generating
combines.summary: Empire Generating Co (GO) and NAES Corporation - Empire (GOP) share the Rensselaer, NY plant site.

combines.label: Astoria Energy I/II
combines.summary: Astoria Energy and Astoria Energy II share the Steinway Street plant office in Astoria, NY.

combines.label: Bridgeport Harbor
combines.summary: Bridgeport Harbor and Bridgeport Energy share the Bridgeport Harbor station complex in Connecticut.
